items.name: Saw Wings
items.description:
These wings are crafted of real saws! The method was quite simple, run down to a local hobby or depot store, buy a ton of saws, melt them down into wing molds, and BOOM. Saw Wings!

Part of my accessory series: My Take On Build To Survive The Zombies by DANGERTIM112.
